blur_detection.description: The text and edges show moderate blur, likely due to camera movement or slight out-of-focus capture.
blur_detection.recommendation: Re-capture the image with a steadier hand or use a tripod to minimize blur.

contrast_assessment.description: The contrast between text and background is adequate but could be slightly improved for better readability.
contrast_assessment.recommendation: Ensure proper lighting and avoid backlighting to enhance contrast.

glare_identification.description: No significant glare or overexposed regions are detected in the image.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discoloration are present in the document.
water_stains.recommendation: No action needed regarding water stains.

tears_or_folds.description: No visible tears, folds, or creases are detected in the document.
tears_or_folds.recommendation: No action needed regarding tears or folds.

cut_off_detection.description: A small portion of the document's edges are slightly cut off, but it does not affect critical information.
cut_off_detection.recommendation: Ensure the entire document is within the frame when capturing the image.

missing_sections.description: No missing sections or incomplete parts are detected in the document.
missing_sections.recommendation: No action needed regarding missing sections.

obstructions.description: No obstructions such as fingers, shadows, or objects are blocking the document content.

classification.reasoning: The document contains all necessary fields to be classified as an expense. It includes supplier details, consumer details, transaction amount, transaction date, invoice number, tax information, payment method, and item description line items.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: All required fields are present, confirming this is an expense document.

extraction.special_notes: You'll pay €99.17 (inclusive of all applicable taxes) each month until you cancel. Cancel anytime by clicking the "me" icon on the homepage -> click Settings & Privacy -> select Manage Premium Account go to Admin Center -> select your subscription Cancel. See here for detailed instructions on how to cancel. Prices are subject to change. Have questions or need help? Please visit our Help Center.

issues.description: The receipt does not show the ICP company details for Global People IT-Services GmbH as required.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Invoice must show Global People IT-Services GmbH, Kärntner Ring 12, A-1010 Vienna, Austria VAT ID: ATU77112189 - The Local Employers name and details should appear on invoices, not the workers

issues.description: Training expenses require the approval of the direct manager.
issues.recommendation: Manager approval is required before processing this training expense
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Training expenses require the approval of the direct manager

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt is missing the required ICP company details and requires manager approval for training expenses.
